topic: How a multi-branch operation manages payroll for four locations from one screen
format: Open with a SmartPro Hub product capability, then show the real-world business outcome it enables
post:
Four branches. Four payroll runs. One finance manager handling all of it from a single screen.

That's not a pitch — it's what SmartPro Hub customers running multi-location operations in Oman actually do every month.

Here's what it looks like:

Each branch has its own employee roster, leave balances, and WPS submission. Without the right setup, that's four spreadsheets, four bank files, and four chances to miss a deadline.

With SmartPro Hub, the finance manager switches between locations inside the same dashboard. One payroll cycle. Direct bank integration. WPS submissions go out from the same screen where she approved leave requests that morning.

No consolidation step. No file transfers. No calls to branch admin asking "did you send me the hours?"

We built this because multi-branch businesses in Oman weren't struggling with payroll math — they were drowning in coordination. That's a different problem, and it needed a different fix.

Starts at OMR 25/month. 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

If you're managing more than one location and still reconciling payroll by hand — how many hours does that eat up each month?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
